## orch-go status

List active OpenCode sessions

### Synopsis

List all active OpenCode sessions with their status.

Shows session ID, workspace/title, directory, and last update time.

```
orch-go status [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for status
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --server string   OpenCode server URL (default "http://127.0.0.1:4096")
```
